name: Homepage
description: A full homepage showcase with hero, features, image-text section, testimonials, stats, and call-to-action

fields.heading: Build Something Amazing
fields.subheading: A modern, lightning-fast CMS that gives you complete control over your content. Create beautiful websites with powerful block-based editing and instant page loads.

fields.heading: Everything You Need
fields.subheading: Powerful features built for teams that demand speed, flexibility, and reliability.

features.title: Lightning Fast
features.description: Sub-50ms time to first byte ensures your visitors never wait. Every page loads instantly, keeping bounce rates low and engagement high.

features.title: Block Editor
features.description: Build pages visually with a rich library of content blocks. Drag, drop, and configure — no coding required.

features.title: Theme System
features.description: Swap themes instantly without rebuilding. Customize layouts, partials, and styles through a clean manifest-driven architecture.

features.title: RBAC
features.description: Fine-grained role-based access control lets you manage who can view, edit, and publish content across your entire site.

features.title: Multi-Language
features.description: Reach a global audience with built-in multi-language support. Manage translations side-by-side for every piece of content.

features.title: Extensible
features.description: Extend functionality with sandboxed Tengo scripts. Add custom logic without touching core code or restarting the server.

fields.heading: Powerful Content Management
fields.body: Take full control of your digital presence with an intuitive admin interface and a flexible block-based content model. Create, preview, and publish pages in minutes — not hours. Our node-based architecture means every piece of content is structured, searchable, and ready for any channel.

testimonials.quote: We migrated 200 pages in a single afternoon. The block editor made restructuring our content painless, and our page load times dropped by 80%.
The theme system is a game-changer. We manage 30 client sites from a single codebase and can roll out design updates across all of them in minutes.
Finally, a CMS that developers and content editors both love. The Tengo scripting layer lets us add custom features without touching the core.

fields.heading: Ready to Get Started?
fields.body: Join hundreds of teams building faster, more flexible websites. Start your free trial today — no credit card required.
